queue.title: Add safe-fetch.mjs unit tests (d071 lib_modules coverage)
queue.description: safe-fetch.mjs has no test file. Now that it has DNS error detection (wq-790), tests should cover: SSRF blocking, timeout handling, dns_failed error type, connection_error type, successful fetch, fetchStatus/fetchBody helpers. Part of d071 lib_modules remaining coverage.

queue.title: Fix duplicate pattern IDs in knowledge base
queue.description: R#304 finding: knowledge_prune remove/validate operations match the first pattern with a given ID, but duplicate IDs exist (p028, p029, p030 each had 2 entries from different sources). This caused collateral damage — 2 valid patterns (p028 'Granular permission layering', p029 'Task dependency tracking') were removed instead of their stale duplicates. Fix: either deduplicate IDs in the knowledge store (renumber stale entries) or update knowledge_prune to accept a disambiguator (source, title substring).

outcome.note: One duplicate: p030 appeared twice (handshake protocol + content sandboxing). Renumbered second to p039. Node script used for reliable fix.

queue.title: Add Colony JWT refresh to E session prehook
queue.description: Colony JWTs expire every 24h. The 14-token-refresh.sh pre-session hook refreshes on session start, but if an E session starts >23h after last refresh, the JWT may expire mid-session. Add a Colony-specific freshness check to 35-e-session-prehook_E.sh that validates token expiry before platform selection, similar to credential checks for other platforms.

queue.title: Add DI to orchestrator-cli.mjs for unit testability
queue.description: handleDiversityTrends and handleDiversity in orchestrator-cli.mjs use hardcoded STATE_DIR and direct analyzeEngagement() calls, making isolated unit testing impossible. Add a deps parameter (like e-prompt-sections.mjs pattern) to allow full mock coverage without touching the filesystem. Part of d071 lib_modules coverage.

queue.title: Extend duplicate-key linting to all critical JSON state files
queue.description: validate-human-review.mjs's duplicate-key parser could be generalized into a shared utility that checks all hand-edited JSON files (directives.json, work-queue.json, account-registry.json) during pre-session. JSON.parse silently takes the last duplicate key value, making these bugs invisible. Create validate-json-keys.mjs that wraps the parser and runs against all state files.

queue.title: Batch liveness sweep for 7 needs_probe accounts
queue.description: 7 accounts stuck in needs_probe status: linkclaws, strangerloops, agora, moltcities, shipyard, moltr, clawnews. Some are actively used (agora in s1727) but still marked needs_probe. Run DNS/HTTP checks and update account-registry.json statuses to live, defunct, or inactive as appropriate.

outcome.note: All 7 needs_probe accounts confirmed live via DNS+HTTP checks. Updated to live in account-registry.json with detailed notes. Also swept moltstack (8th needs_probe). Zero needs_probe remaining. Registry: 30 live, 12 defunct, 7 inactive, 1 active, 1 rejected.
